title: Validating Email Addresses
scenario: Generate a JavaScript function that validates email addresses according to the standard email format (RFC 5322). The function should accept an email string as input and return a boolean indicating whether the email is valid. The output should be a code snippet, formatted according to standard JavaScript conventions.
constraints: Must use a regular expression-based approach
Must handle edge cases for email addresses with special characters

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the JavaScript code snippet is syntactically correct, following standard JavaScript conventions.
Check whether the generated code meets the specified constraints (regular expression usage and edge case handling).
Evaluate the correctness of the generated code, ensuring it accurately validates email addresses according to the standard email format.
Assess the code's readability and maintainability, considering comment quality, variable naming, and overall structure.
